3.en: Declaration on the Rights of Manof Dec. 10, 1948, adopted by the General Assembly of the United Nations, and also cf. theDeclaration of the Rights of Childrenof Nov. 20 1959; additional protocol to the Convention Safeguarding the Rights of Men and Fundamental Liberties, Paris, March 20, 1952; regarding that universal profession of the character of human laws cf. apostolic letterPacem in Terris, of John XXIII of April 11, 1963:A.A.S. 55 (1963) p. 295 ff.

6.en: Cf. Pius XI's encyclical letter,Divini Illius Magistri, Dec. 31, 1929:A.A.S. 22 (1930) p. 50 ff.
